free_text: the absolute values of these cross sections depends
upon the assumption that the differential cross
elastically scattered tritons from B-10 at 1.500 MeV
are equal to the Rutherford values.)
The uncertainties of the absolute cross
sections depend primarily upon the validity of the
assumption that the constant ratio of the observed
elastic scattering cross section to the Rutherford
value is unity at low angles. It is believed that
this assumption leads to an uncertainty in the
absolute cross sections of no more than 10%.
